text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Tch. Pathetic. That was such a sluggish run...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm fine! You just worry about your own job!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Damn, I'm so weak! Weak! I shouldn't be worn out
already.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Run harder... harder. I've got to run harder!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to get results due to fatigue, Narita Brian
has become more impatient and irritated than
usual... This isn't good.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We shouldn't push it any harder. I should
probably rethink her race schedule...
